doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document grossly misstates Illinois law—a 5-day notice actually gives tenants a right to cure by paying rent and requires the landlord to file suit before eviction—so this cannot be genuine HUD/AG material.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document grossly misstates Illinois law—a 5-day notice gives tenants the right to cure by paying rent and requires landlords to file an eviction lawsuit before tenants must vacate—indicating this is not a genuine HUD/AG publication.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document grossly misstates Illinois law—a 5-day notice actually gives tenants a right to cure by paying rent and requires the landlord to file suit before eviction—so this cannot be genuine HUD/AG material.
